title: alnus ovata
intro: Alnus ovata, also known as the green alder, is a deciduous tree species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Alnus ovata include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Alnus ovata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant, making it effective in treating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Alnus ovata is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with the dried bark and leaves being used to make teas and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
